commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=2920af3dac735fd16b3af33fa455d2a3b3066eb0)
commands.review_summary:
The PR scopes Discord voice connections to `openclaw:<accountId>` and adds delayed autoJoin timers after READY/RESUMED and provider startup.

PR surface: Source +41. Total +41 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR-introduced regression from source inspection: delayed provider timers call `autoJoin()`, and `autoJoin()` reaches `join()`, which stops an existing guild session. The original multi-bot collision is dependency-contract-supported but still lacks live Discord proof in the PR.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blockers are code/test repair plus contributor real Discord proof; ClawSweeper automation cannot supply proof of the contributor’s live multi-bot setup.

target.title: fix(discord): account-scoped voice groups + delayed autoJoin safety net
target.body:
## Summary
- Delays READY/RESUMED autoJoin by 6s so voice gateway state settles before joining
- Scopes `@discordjs/voice` connections by account ID (`group: "openclaw:<accountId>"`) to prevent multi-bot collisions
- Adds 8s and 75s delayed autoJoin safety nets in the provider to catch transient voice state windows

## Motivation
When multiple bot accounts share a Discord guild, `@discordjs/voice` stores connections by `(group, guildId)` with a default group of `"default"`. Without account scoping, bots block each other's voice connections.

The READY/RESUMED gateway events fire before voice server/state info has fully arrived, so autoJoin can fail with "unknown voice state" if called immediately. A 6s delay gives these updates time to arrive. Two additional delayed retries (8s, 75s) catch cases where voice state is still not ready after 6s.

## Changes
| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `extensions/discord/src/voice/manager.ts` | `startAutoJoin` wraps in 6s `setTimeout`; new `resolveVoiceConnectionGroup()` helper; all `getVoiceConnection`/`joinVoiceChannel` calls include `group` param |
| `extensions/discord/src/monitor/provider.ts` | After voice listener registration, schedule autoJoin retries at 8s and 75s |

## Test plan
- [ ] Single bot: voice autoJoin works as before (no regression)
- [ ] Multi-bot (same guild): each bot maintains independent voice connection
- [ ] Gateway reconnect: autoJoin succeeds after READY event (6s delay)
- [ ] Late voice state: 8s/75s retry catches transient failures
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
target.author: geekhuashan
